name: sap-agentic-harness
description: Harness-portable lite edition of SuperClaude for SAP — 14+BC module knowledge packs, 14 industries, 16 countries, ABAP conventions/templates, 26 consultant/role personas (on-demand via INDEX selector), 11 single-agent procedures with human approval + fresh-context review gates, and the ABAP ADT MCP server (155 tools inspection-only / 186 connected). No multi-agent orchestration: quality model is one worker + one fresh-context reviewer + SAP machine verification (CheckSyntax → Activate → ABAP Unit → ATC).
